Hi Emma,
I've attached a file to this email. Could you please help me update my GitHub repository, alicemiller/sorting_searching, by placing this file under the sorting_searching/data directory?

Thank you very much for your help.
Best regards, Alice

compress.py.content:
import zipfile
def compress_file(input_file, output_zip):
    with zipfile.ZipFile(output_zip, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
        zipf.write(input_file, arcname=input_file.split("/")[-1])
compress_file('inputs/example.txt', 'outputs/example.zip')

from PIL import Image

# Open an image
img = Image.open("example.jpg")

# Resize the image
img_resized = img.resize((200, 200))
img_resized.show()

# Rotate the image
img_rotated = img.rotate(90)  # Rotate by 90 degrees
img_rotated.show()

product_list.description: A high-precision wireless mouse with ergonomic design.
reviews: Very smooth tracking and comfortable to use for long hours.
Battery life is impressive for a mouse at this price.
Works well, but the scroll wheel feels a bit loose.
Good value for money, especially for office work.

product_list.description: A durable mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB lighting and tactile switches.
reviews: Keys feel amazing and very responsive.
RGB customization software is decent but could be better.
Solid build quality, definitely built to last.
A bit loud for shared offices, but great for gaming.
Exceeded my expectations overall.

product_list.description: Wireless over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.
reviews: Noise cancellation works extremely well on flights.
Sound quality is rich with strong bass.
Very comfortable even after hours of use.
Battery lasts almost a full week for me.
A bit pricey, but worth it.

product_list.description: 27-inch 4K UHD display with ultra-thin bezels and HDR support.
reviews: Crisp image quality, great for coding and design.
HDR is okay but not mind-blowing.
Bezels are thin and look very modern.
Setup was straightforward.

product_list.description: Durable 1.5m USB-C fast-charging cable.
reviews: Does the job, charging speed is fine.
Cable feels sturdy.
Stopped working after a few months, but replacement was easy.

product_list.description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with deep bass and waterproof design.
reviews: Surprisingly loud for its size.
Bass is strong but mids are average.
Used it at the beach with no issues.
Good for casual listening.

product_list.description: Fitness tracking smartwatch with heart-rate monitor and GPS.
reviews: Fitness tracking is accurate most of the time.
Battery life could be better.
Interface is smooth and easy to use.
GPS takes a bit long to lock.

product_list.description: Adjustable aluminum stand compatible with 13–17 inch laptops.
reviews: Helps a lot with posture.
Very sturdy and well-built.
Angle adjustment is smooth.
Lightweight but stable.

product_list.description: High-speed 1TB portable solid-state drive with USB-C interface.
reviews: Extremely fast transfer speeds.
Compact and easy to carry.
Works perfectly with my Mac and PC.
No heating issues even under load.
Excellent reliability so far.

product_list.description: Extended-size RGB gaming mouse pad with non-slip base.
reviews: RGB lighting looks cool on my desk.
Surface is smooth for gaming.
Edges started fraying slightly after months.

product_list.description: Rechargeable toothbrush with 3 cleaning modes and 2-minute timer.
reviews: Teeth feel noticeably cleaner.
Timer is very helpful.
Charging base is a bit bulky.
Good alternative to more expensive brands.

product_list.description: Insulated water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12.
reviews: Keeps water cold all day.
No leaks so far.
Solid and well insulated.

product_list.description: Non-slip TPE yoga mat with 6mm cushioning.
reviews: Comfortable cushioning.
Slight chemical smell at first.
Grip is okay but not perfect.

product_list.description: 15W fast wireless charging pad compatible with smartphones and earbuds.
reviews: Charging speed is slower than advertised.
Convenient for overnight charging.
Phone gets a bit warm.

product_list.description: Dimmable LED desk lamp with adjustable arm and USB charging port.
reviews: Brightness levels are very flexible.
USB port is super handy.
Looks sleek on my desk.
No flicker at all.

product_list.description: HEPA filter air purifier suitable for small to medium rooms.
reviews: Noticeable improvement in air quality.
Quiet on low settings.
Replacement filters are a bit expensive.

product_list.description: Water-resistant laptop backpack with multiple compartments.
reviews: Fits my laptop perfectly.
Comfortable straps.
Good organization for daily commute.
Material feels durable.

product_list.description: 10-piece stainless steel cookware set compatible with all stovetops.
reviews: Heats evenly.
Easy to clean.
A bit heavy but feels premium.
Good set for the price.

product_list.description: Color-changing LED bulb controllable via mobile app or voice assistants.
reviews: Colors are vibrant.
App occasionally disconnects.
Works well with voice assistant.

product_list.description: Professional drafting mechanical pencil set with refills.
reviews: Very precise for drawing.
Great value for students.
Grip is comfortable.

product_list.description: Electric burr coffee grinder with adjustable grind settings.
reviews: Grind consistency is solid.
A bit noisy but expected.
Good for espresso and drip.

product_list.description: A Lightweight blasketball shoes.
reviews: Excellent cushioning on court.
Very supportive for lateral movement.
Design looks great.
Runs slightly narrow.

product_list.description: Lightweight running shoes with breathable mesh and cushioned soles from SpeedStep.
reviews: Lightweight but lacks durability.
Comfortable for short runs.
Sole wears out quickly.

product_list.description: Lightweight running shoes with breathable mesh and cushioned soles from Adidas.
reviews: Very comfortable for daily training.
Good balance between cushioning and responsiveness.
Breathability is excellent.
A bit pricey but reliable.

product_list.description: Lightweight running shoes with breathable mesh and cushioned soles from PUMA.
reviews: Stylish and comfortable.
Good traction on pavement.
Slightly stiff at first.
Breaks in after a few runs.

product_list.description: A black basketball shoes.
reviews: Iconic design and premium feel.
Very comfortable for casual wear.
Not ideal for long basketball sessions.
Expensive but worth it for fans.

product_list.description: A men's road running shoes.
reviews: Amazing cushioning for long runs.
Feels very stable.
Upper is breathable and soft.
Great for daily mileage.

product_list.description: A men's casual shoes.
reviews: Water resistance works well.
Classic look with extra durability.
Slightly heavier than regular AF1.
Good for rainy days.

product_list.description: Men's black crewneck tee for training.
product_list.product_name: adidas Men's Essentials Feel Ready Training T-Shirt
reviews: Really nice color and fabric, soft and breathable.
Super comfortable and breathable shirt. Would buy again.
This is a great training tee. I really liked how it feels and the materials are pretty well made. Very comfortable to wear.
This shirt is green. I do not think it is moisture wicking.
I love white shirts because I can wear it with any color of my track suits.
Quality made products. The t-shirts go with anything and are ready for any situation.
I was a little bit worried about how durable would be the material but so far no complaints.

product_list.description: Men's cool-touch t-shirt made with recycled materials, black colors.
reviews: Good fit, nice material.
it's a sintetic shirt not the cotton as it was written in description.
The shirt came with yellow stains.

Thicker material than other fitness shirts and good quality. I like these shirts as a larger gym shirt when it's cooler out, but not wearing while working out. Color is good along with value for money.

product_list.description: This red t-shirt is designed with comfort in mind, featuring a relaxed fit that is roomy at the body with a straight silhouette.
product_list.product_name: Boys' Stay Dry Climalite Short Sleeve T-Shirt
reviews: Super comfortable material, fit is true to size (see size chart and trust it). Loose fit. You have to pay attention to what type of shirt you are buying for sportswear. This is loose fit, not meant to be tight. Holds up after multiple washes, great value for the price. I re-buy every time one in a different color is available. The polyester mix material is great for people with sensitive skin. It is also light weight and breathable for hot days.

Excellent t-shirt from [Brand Name]! The cotton quality is superior, very soft to the touch, and the fit is perfect; neither too loose nor too tight. The color remains intact after several washes. Highly recommended!
Chego 5 dias antes material e o que vende está perfeita.
Well made. Fits true to size. Good color and quality. Comfortable and light weight. Washes well.

product_list.description: A black running T-shirt.
product_list.product_name: Men's Park Short Sleeve T Shirt
reviews: Very good quality shirt soft and comfortable!
Fast shipping, good quality. I'm an XL in Nike and Adidas; however, this XL is a bit tight on me. The colors are very pretty.

I love these Nike shirts! The material is excellent quality — not too thin, not too thick, just the right weight. They keep cool and comfortable, which makes them perfect for my fiancé whether he’s working outdoors or heading to the kids’ sporting events. Versatile, breathable, and stylish. Definitely a great buy for the price!
A mi hijo le gustò esa playera.
Muy lindos y buena calidad la tela maravillosa coinciden las talla lo recomiendo 1010.

So I bought a “new” shirt. Fit is perfect and it looks great. The shirt was delivered without any tags and smelled like body odor. I ordered four and the other three smelled fine and did have the tags. It’s pretty obvious that this was a returned shirt that someone didn’t want and was purchased as new from me.

product_list.description: A red T-shirt designed for active play; soccer jerseys kids provide breathability and flexibility; perfect for young athletes who love the game.
product_list.product_name: Nike Youth Park VII Short Sleeve Jersey, BV6742-010
reviews: Great quality shirts! The size was accurate, providing a reliable, true-to-fit experience. They were nice and cool to wear, making them ideal for the summer months. My son loved them, and I would definitely purchase them again.
Love this shirt !!! Great panel back. Shirt holds it color.
Nicer than I expected. The Nike check is embroidered not just a vinyl. I will say the shirt is different than the Nike pro dri fit shirts but still a great shirt my son loves it.

My teen is pretty picky with the shorts he wears. The size was perfect. The soft gray color and quality fabric are a nice addition to the shirts he will wear. I bought it for the value for the money and the bonus was the breathabilty of the shirt. He asked me what other colors he could get it in next.

product_list.description: The ultimate mobile workstation for creative professionals; features a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display and the powerhouse M3 Max chip for seamless 8K video editing and 3D rendering.
product_list.product_name: Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch, M3 Pro Chip (16-core CPU, 40-core GPU)
reviews: The performance is simply breathtaking. I can render complex 4K projects in half the time it took on my previous Intel Mac. The Space Black finish is sleek and surprisingly resistant to fingerprints.
Best laptop screen I have ever seen. The 120Hz ProMotion makes everything feel butter-smooth, and the battery life actually lasts a full workday even with heavy Lightroom use.
It is a massive investment, but for professional video work, it pays for itself in saved time. The speakers are also surprisingly deep and clear for a laptop.

product_list.description: A premium 16-inch ultra-slim gaming laptop that blurs the line between work and play; featuring an AMD Ryzen™ AI 9 processor and NVIDIA® RTX 50-series graphics in a sleek 1.49cm aluminum chassis.
reviews: If you're looking for a 'MacBook for gamers,' this is the perfect choice. The G16 feels incredibly solid and the 240Hz OLED screen is spectacular for both editing and high-speed gaming.
The new slash lighting on the lid is subtle but cool. It handles heavy creative software easily, though the fans can get a bit loud when you're pushing the RTX 5070 to its limit.
Nicer than I expected for a gaming rig. The Ceraluminum finish is smooth and premium. It’s light enough to carry to meetings but has the power to run any AAA title I throw at it.

product_list.description: A set of 3 matte-finished ceramic vases in varying sizes, perfect for dried flowers or as standalone decor pieces.
reviews: The texture is lovely and they look much more expensive than they are.
Perfect for my Nordic-style living room. Very well-packaged.
Smaller than I imagined, but the quality is top-notch.

product_list.description: Set of 4 ultra-absorbent, 700 GSM Egyptian cotton towels including two bath towels and two hand towels.
reviews: So thick and fluffy! They feel like hotel quality.
After several washes, they are still soft and haven't lost their color.
Best towels I've owned, highly recommend for the price.

product_list.description: 3-tier eco-friendly bamboo shoe rack with a sturdy structure, capable of holding up to 9 pairs of shoes.
reviews: Very easy to assemble, took me only 10 minutes.
Fits perfectly in my narrow entryway. Bamboo looks very clean.
Sturdy enough for heavy boots, doesn't wobble at all.

product_list.description: Pair of thermal insulated linen blend curtains with 90% light blocking capability and noise reduction.
reviews: They look like real linen but provide amazing darkness for sleeping.
Kept my room much cooler during the recent heatwave.
The grey color is beautiful and matches the photos exactly.

product_list.description: Premium Bluetooth over-ear headphones with industry-leading noise cancellation and 40-hour battery life.
reviews: The Bluetooth connection is rock solid, and the sound is incredibly detailed.
Best active noise cancelling I've ever experienced, perfect for office work.
Luxury feel with the leather ear pads, worth every penny.

product_list.description: True wireless Bluetooth headphones with touch controls, water resistance, and a compact charging case.
reviews: Great value Bluetooth buds for the gym, they never fall out.
Battery life is decent, and the auto-pairing works flawlessly with my phone.
Sound is good for the price, though the bass could be punchier.

product_list.description: High-fidelity wired gaming headset with a 3.5mm gold-plated jack and high-resolution 50mm drivers for zero-latency audio.
reviews: No lag issues since it's wired, which is essential for competitive gaming.
The braided cable is very durable and long enough to reach my PC under the desk.
Crystal clear audio, much better than my previous wireless headset in this price range.

product_list.description: Budget-friendly Bluetooth headphones with foldable design and built-in FM radio mode.
reviews: It's okay for the price, but the plastic feels a bit cheap and creaks when I move.
The Bluetooth connection drops occasionally if I put my phone in my back pocket.
Sound quality is average, lacks bass, but works fine for listening to podcasts.
Battery life is shorter than advertised, lasted about 5 hours instead of 10.

product_list.description: A premium 14.5-inch professional laptop featuring a 3K OLED touch display with 120Hz refresh rate. Powered by the latest Intel Core Ultra 7 processor, 32GB LPDDR5X RAM, and a 1TB Gen4 SSD for seamless multitasking and creative workflows.
reviews: The 3K OLED screen is absolute perfection for color-critical work. 120Hz makes the whole UI feel incredibly responsive.
Solid aluminum build that rivals the MacBook Pro, but with the flexibility of Windows. The haptic touchpad is a joy to use.
Performance is top-tier; it handles 4K video editing and large datasets without breaking a sweat or getting too loud.
For $1499, getting 32GB of RAM and this level of display is a fantastic value compared to other flagship models.

product_list.description: An ergonomic 2.4GHz wireless optical mouse with adjustable DPI (800-1600) and silent-click buttons, designed for comfortable all-day office use.
reviews: The silent click is actually silent! Perfect for working in the library.
Battery life is amazing, I've used it for 3 months on a single AA battery.
A bit small for large hands, but very portable for my laptop bag.

product_list.description: A high-performance wired gaming mouse with a 26,000 DPI optical sensor, ultra-lightweight 58g design, and customizable RGB lighting.
reviews: Zero latency. The paracord cable is so light it almost feels wireless.
The sensor is incredibly accurate for flick shots in Valorant.
The RGB software is easy to use and syncs perfectly with my KeyMaster keyboard.

5.content:
Software Development Meeting Summary

Date: 2024-05-19
Attendees: Engineering Team, Product Manager, Tech Lead

1. Project Status
  - The core backend services are functionally complete.
  - Frontend integration is in progress, with most major views implemented.
  - Current build is stable in the development environment.

2. Recent Progress
  - Completed API endpoints for user authentication and data management.
  - Refactored database schema to improve query performance.
  - Added initial logging and error-handling mechanisms.

3. Next Steps
  - Complete frontend-backend integration.
  - Prepare a release candidate for internal testing.
  - Schedule a follow-up review meeting to assess readiness for deployment.
